fields.name: designation
fields.description: Source designation formed from sexigesimal coordinates

fields.name: ra
fields.description: Right ascension (J2000 decimal deg) based on peak pixel

fields.name: dec
fields.description: Declination (J2000 decimal deg) based on peak pixel

fields.name: r_k20fe
fields.description: 20 mag/sq-arcsec isophotal K fiducial elliptical aperture semi-major axis

fields.name: j_m_k20fe
fields.description: J 20 mag/sq-arcsec isophotal fiducial elliptical aperture magnitude

fields.name: h_m_k20fe
fields.description: H 20 mag/sq-arcsec isophotal fiducial elliptical aperture magnitude

fields.name: k_m_k20fe
fields.description: K 20 mag/sq-arcsec isophotal fiducial elliptical aperture magnitude

fields.name: k_m_ext
fields.description: K magnitude from fit extrapolation (total magnitude)

fields.name: sup_ba
fields.description: Minor/major axis ratio fit to the 3-sigma super-coadd isophote

fields.name: sup_phi
fields.description: Super-coadd angle to major axis (E of N)
